title: YouTube Poop: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
description:
For Inferno there is no escape from the deadly threat that is the stone.

This originally started with searching for that Snickers commercial with the panda, and it snowballed from there.

Clips in Order Of Appearance:

- Faces Of Evil
- Snickers Commercial (Pretty Panda)
- Hotel Mario
- Beast Wars
- Flyentology by El-P
- Adventures Of Sonic The Hedgehog
- Volvic
- Wand Of Gamelon
- Snickers Commercial (Viking Rage)
- Josh & Taylor
- Super Mario World (Audio Clip)
